features: For use on rough nails or skin double sided for a smooth finish.
The Lamarque disposable foot files are a handy size to carry in purses or handbags or to store at home.
Perfect for filing hard skin areas of your feet or smoothing rough nails.
Costeffective alternative to disposable or reusable diamond files.
Wide surface smoothes the skin more easily. Single file pack
description: Product description AB Care (Formally Lamarque) Disposable Foot Files For use with rough nails or skin 18cm Length Available in packs of x10, or value multi saving packs of x50 & x100 Double sided to give a smooth finish. The AB Care (Formally Lamarque) Disposable Foot Files are in a handy size to carry in purses or handbags or keep at home. Perfect for filing those hard skin areas of your feet or for smoothing rough nails. Cost-effective alternative to single-use or reusable diamond deb files. Lasts several uses Double Sided Broad surface area smooths skin easier Non-autoclavable. Foot Beauty Hints & Tips For best results, use a foot file after a relaxing bath, or soak your feet in a bowl of warm water for a few minutes to help soften the skin. Before using a foot file, dry your feet, and between your toes, thoroughly. If the skin on your feet is very hard, you should use a coarse or extra-coarse strip when filing them. Caution: Not recommended for use by diabetics. People with circulatory disorders should seek professional medical advice before using this product. Not Suitable for Autoclaves Directions Soak feet in warm water, dry thoroughly, use coarse or extra-coarse strip for hard skin areas Safety Warning Caution: Not recommended for use by diabetics. People with circulatory disorders should seek professional medical advice before using this product. Not Suitable for Autoclaves. See more
